steps.title: Use the discriminant condition
steps.content:
A quadratic has exactly one real solution when its discriminant is $0$. For
$$-4x^2+24x+c=0$$
the values are $a=-4$, $b=24$, and constant term $c$.

steps.title: Match the constant
steps.content: The needed value of $c$ matches choice C. The answer is C.
